---
title: "Projects"
---

# Sports Marketing & Analytics Projects

Welcome to my portfolio of marketing and analytics work. These projects highlight my experience with data visualization, campaign analysis, audience engagement, and marketing strategy.

---

# NBA Fan Engagement Analysis

## Overview
This project analyzed NBA fan engagement trends across social media platforms during the regular season and playoffs.

## Objectives
- Identify which content types generate the highest engagement
- Compare engagement performance across platforms
- Recommend strategies to improve audience interaction

## Tools Used
- Tableau
- Excel
- Google Sheets
- Social Media Analytics

## Key Findings
- Video content generated the highest engagement rates
- Instagram outperformed X (Twitter) in audience interaction
- Engagement increased significantly during playoff periods

## Recommendations
- Increase short-form video content
- Post more game-day interactive content
- Focus marketing efforts around major matchups and playoff games

---

# Sports Merchandise Campaign Performance Dashboard

## Overview
Developed a dashboard to track sales and campaign performance for sports merchandise promotions.

## Features
- Sales trend visualization
- Conversion rate tracking
- Audience segmentation
- Campaign ROI analysis

## Metrics Tracked
- Click-through rate (CTR)
- Conversion rate
- Revenue growth
- Customer engagement

## Outcome
The dashboard improved visibility into campaign performance and helped identify top-performing promotions.

---

# Student Research Participation Analysis

## Overview
Analyzed how student motivation, engagement, and research participation experiences influence future participation intentions.

## Objectives
- Measure relationships between engagement and satisfaction
- Visualize participation trends
- Identify factors that encourage continued participation

## Skills Demonstrated
- Data cleaning
- Statistical analysis
- Data visualization
- Research reporting

---

# Marketing Analytics Presentation

This project involved creating a RevealJS presentation focused on marketing analytics and data-driven decision making.

## Topics Covered
- Consumer engagement metrics
- Digital marketing performance
- Campaign optimization strategies
- Data storytelling techniques

---

# Tableau Dashboard Project

## Overview
Created an interactive Tableau dashboard using public datasets to visualize trends and insights.

## Dashboard Features
- Interactive filters
- Trend analysis
- Comparative visualizations
- KPI tracking

## Skills Used
- Tableau Public
- Data visualization
- Dashboard design
- Analytical storytelling

---

# Future Projects

Upcoming projects I plan to add include:

- Sports sponsorship analytics
- Fan sentiment analysis
- Social media campaign optimization
- Ticket sales forecasting
- Athlete brand engagement analysis
